stemHtml: Where should a runway-holding position marking be placed?

options.a: On a taxiway intersecting a runway, and on a runway intersecting another runway if it is part of a standard taxi route.
options.c: On a taxiway intersecting a runway, and on a runway intersecting another runway only if the runway is used for landing after the intersection.
options.d: On a taxiway intersecting a runway only.
